chunks.title: Jeremiah Released by Nebuzaradan
chunks.reason: Narrative account of Jeremiah's release and initial instructions from the captain.

chunks.title: Gedaliah Appointed and People Gather
chunks.reason: Description of military commanders joining Gedaliah and the return of exiles to Judah.

chunks.title: Johanan Warns Gedaliah About Ishmael
chunks.reason: Exchange of warnings and responses between Johanan and Gedaliah regarding the plot against Gedaliah.
